summary: First iteration testing of ESP32 Sensor Dash. Backend: 5/5 pytest tests pass (GET /api/ message, /api/mock-sensor numeric fields, no time keys, correct value ranges, per-call variability). Frontend: full UI flow exercised on 390x844 mobile viewport via web preview. All required testIDs present and visible; default state shows Disconnected pill + error banner + retry button (ESP32 unreachable from cloud - expected). Settings navigation, URL validation (invalid URL keeps user on settings and shows endpoint-input-error), demo toggle + 2s interval save flow all work. On return to Dashboard, useFocusEffect reloads config: pill turns 'Connected', endpoint-label shows 'DEMO • <backend>/api/mock-sensor', metric values are numeric (22.2°C / 37.5% / 753 lux), and auto-refresh at 2s updates last-updated-label between polls.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: RN Web console shows deprecation warning 'shadow* style props are deprecated. Use boxShadow' from the FAB styles in app/index.tsx (shadowColor/shadowOpacity/shadowRadius/shadowOffset). Non-blocking on native; consider migrating to boxShadow for web parity.

Info: Real ESP32 endpoint is http:// while app is served over https:// in web preview, so browsers block the request as Mixed Content. This is expected on native devices where it works fine — documented behavior, no action needed but worth noting for QA on web.
server.py imports motor/AsyncIOMotorClient and connects to MongoDB although no route uses it; safe to keep for platform template, but could be removed to reduce startup surface.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL=https://wifi-sensor-dash.preview.emergentagent.com. Real ESP32 at 192.168.68.71 is unreachable from cloud (expected) and also blocked as Mixed Content in the web preview - always enable demo-mode-switch first in Settings to exercise live data. Pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_sensor_api.py is the regression suite. All testIDs verified: dashboard-screen, connection-hero-card, connection-status-pill, endpoint-label, last-updated-label, metric-temperature[-value], metric-humidity[-value], metric-brightness[-value], error-banner, retry-button, settings-fab, open-settings-button, settings-screen, settings-back-button, endpoint-input, endpoint-input-error, interval-segmented, interval-option-{2s,5s,10s}, demo-mode-switch, save-settings-button.
rca_of_issue: N/A - no bugs found. All 9 feature requirements from the review request pass.
